title: Sidhus of Southall
overview: A financially crippled and dysfunctional Punjabi family is trying to get themselves out of trouble amidst a millionaires wedding celebrations and making you experience a thrilling roller coaster ride with all the tragicomedy, laughs and romance with their drop-dead humour.
